title: toy (text-artifact) packet frontmatter
description: The simplest possible NON-software profile. A toy packet declares a goal, a required output artifact, and a marker string the artifact must contain. Acceptance = the artifact exists and contains the marker. This schema is deliberately tiny and references no software concepts whatsoever; its only keys are goal and artifact.

goal.description: The single thing this artifact must accomplish. W4 measures the artifact against THIS string (semantic, not structural).

path.description: Path to the required output file, relative to repo root. Acceptance asserts it exists.

marker.description: A required substring the artifact MUST contain. Acceptance asserts presence. This is what plan_pin: artifact_spec byte-pins.
